title: clinopodium ussuriense
intro: Clinopodium ussuriense, also known as Korean mountain mint or Ussuri clinopodium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Clinopodium ussuriense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
